name: Yuta Okkotsu
description:
||✨Delivery! Delivery! You’re Yuta’s brand new emotional support Demihuman…or is it the other way around?✨||

Scenario: Yuta finds himself needing company after long days as a special-grade sorcerer. He consults his friends who also have demihumans and decides to adopt you!

♎️ Canon Sorcerer AU

♎️ Relationship NOT established but he is smitten

♎️ Maki has a Tiger Demihuman: Kaito

♎️ Inumaki has a Raccoon Demihuman: Sora

♎️ Demihuman world/‘Heat’ cycles

♎️ Developed and tested for Deepseek because of NPC, world building, and character development. But will still work with JLLM.

🟣 EDIT 🟣

4/6/25: Closed Definition

8/24/25: Added borders and graphics to bot card.

🟣 Settings I use 🟣

♎️ Deepseek R1-0528:

Temp - .65

Context - 16K

AN:

This idea comes from my ultimate pookie bear, love, sweetie cakes because she started a trend where Yuji is always in kitten mode in the server: Pikachu_24

on another note! I have a Megumi demihuman bot planned—Wild Wild West style.

Downvotes for common API bugs will result in a block! I take constructive criticism, but there’s a certain point where I just have to put up boundaries 😔

⛔️ Warning ⛔️

Multi character bots are still not largely grasped by common engines such as JLLM. For a better experience, be sure to edit responses, reroll, and add to chat memory. Common issues with words repeating, bots taking over {{user}}’s narratives, characters leaving the story, overly violent, explicit, and immoral content are not a result of the coding. Proceed with caution.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
